allow: PowerShell($p = \(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if\($p\){ "python: $\($p.Source\)" } else { "no python" }; $n = \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if\($n\){ "node: $\(node --version\)" } else { "no node" }; $py2 = \(Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if\($py2\){ "py launcher: yes" } else { "no py" })
